problem id: 3784c8c6
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(3) XOR NOT SHL(1)) OR SHR(4)

examples:
  11110100 -> 10111111
  00101101 -> 11001110
  11111111 -> 11111111
  00000100 -> 11010111
  01001111 -> 00011111
  11010000 -> 11011101
  01111011 -> 11010111
  10000110 -> 11001111
  00010000 -> 01011111
  10111100 -> 01101011

query: 00100110
predicted answer: 10000010
